sources: CNMV — Comisión Nacional del Mercado de Valores (significant-holdings filings, participaciones significativas)
Annual reports of Spanish listed firms (ownership structure sections)
Norway GPFG — Government Pension Fund Global annual holdings register (public download)
ESMA — European Securities and Markets Authority registries
Company websites for AUM and domicile
Sovereign Wealth Fund Institute (SWFI) — Public Fund Data
_meta.notes: Tier-4 allocator registry. Structural-only: no AUM, no % holdings in this file. Specific Spanish positions go into a separate `holdings.json` populated source-by-source. Completeness flag per entity is honest: verified (specific ES holdings sourced), partial (presence confirmed, stakes TODO), structural (exists + probable Spain exposure via mandate type, no sourcing yet). The outer circle — entities with Spanish exposure only via global index replication — is deliberately included to show the full ecosystem; those are flagged `structural`.

allocators.name: BlackRock (iShares)
allocators.notes: Largest asset manager globally. IBEX-35 exposure via index replication; top-3 holder in most Spanish blue-chips per CNMV filings.

allocators.name: Vanguard
allocators.notes: #2 passive index globally. IBEX exposure via global equity funds.

allocators.name: State Street (SPDR)
allocators.notes: Third of the US passive Big Three. SPDR ETFs touch IBEX via global indexes.

allocators.name: Dimensional Fund Advisors
allocators.notes: Quasi-passive (factor-tilted).

allocators.name: Amundi
allocators.notes: Europe's largest asset manager (Crédit Agricole / Société Générale joint venture). Significant IBEX positions.

allocators.name: Natixis Investment Managers
allocators.notes: Multi-affiliate structure (Harris, Loomis Sayles, Mirova, Ostrum, etc.).

allocators.name: Tikehau Capital
allocators.notes: Alternative assets (private debt, real estate, PE).

allocators.name: DWS Group
allocators.notes: Deutsche Bank's asset management arm.

allocators.name: PIMCO
allocators.notes: Allianz-owned, fixed-income specialist. Holder of Spanish sovereign bonds.

allocators.name: MEAG
allocators.notes: Munich Re Asset Management.

allocators.name: Eurizon Capital
allocators.notes: Intesa Sanpaolo asset management arm.

allocators.name: Robeco
allocators.notes: Strong ESG integration.

allocators.name: NN Investment Partners
allocators.notes: Acquired by Goldman Sachs AM in 2022.

allocators.name: Storebrand
allocators.notes: ESG-focused; Nordic leader.

allocators.name: BBVA Asset Management
allocators.notes: Asset management arm of BBVA. Significant AUM from Spanish retail + institutional.

allocators.name: Gescooperativo
allocators.notes: Asset manager for Spanish cooperative banks.

allocators.name: Mutuactivos
allocators.notes: Mutua Madrileña's asset manager.

allocators.name: Bestinver
allocators.notes: Owned by Acciona group. Value-investing heritage.

allocators.name: Cobas Asset Management
allocators.notes: Founded by Francisco García Paramés.

allocators.name: Andbank Wealth Management
allocators.notes: Spain-based subsidiary of Andorran Andbank.

allocators.name: Banca March
allocators.notes: Private bank controlled by March family.

allocators.name: Fondo de Reserva de la SS
allocators.notes: Spanish Social Security Reserve Fund. Holdings disclosed annually by the Seguridad Social. Largely depleted 2012-2020, partially replenished.

allocators.name: FOGASA
allocators.notes: Fondo de Garantía Salarial — wage guarantee fund.

allocators.name: Fonditel
allocators.notes: Telefónica corporate pension plan manager.

allocators.name: Pontegadea Inversiones
allocators.notes: Amancio Ortega's family office. Holds his Inditex stake + diversified real estate (Spain, US, UK).

allocators.name: Rosp Corunna
allocators.notes: Sandra Ortega's family office.

allocators.name: CriteriaCaixa
allocators.notes: Investment arm of Fundación la Caixa. Controlling shareholder of CaixaBank; stakes in Naturgy, Telefónica, Cellnex.

allocators.name: Corporación Financiera Alba
allocators.notes: March family listed holding company (CIE Automotive, Naturgy, Indra, etc.).

allocators.name: Omega Capital
allocators.notes: Alicia Koplowitz's family office.

allocators.name: Azor Capital
allocators.notes: Koplowitz-associated.

allocators.name: Zriser
allocators.notes: Del Pino family (Ferrovial) office.

allocators.name: Norway GPFG
allocators.notes: Government Pension Fund Global. Largest external holder of IBEX-35. Publishes full holdings register annually.

allocators.name: Qatar Investment Authority
allocators.notes: Known stake in Iberdrola (disclosed to CNMV).

allocators.name: Mubadala Investment Company
allocators.notes: UAE SWF, presence in Spanish industrials (Cepsa).

allocators.name: Saudi Public Investment Fund
allocators.notes: Known Spanish positions (Telefónica stake disclosed).

allocators.name: SAFE (China)
allocators.notes: State Administration of Foreign Exchange.

allocators.name: APG (ABP)
allocators.notes: Manages assets of ABP (Dutch civil servants pension). Large EU equity book.

allocators.name: AP7 (Sweden)
allocators.notes: Default Swedish premium pension fund. Passive global equity; IBEX via MSCI World.

allocators.name: USS (UK Universities)
allocators.notes: Universities Superannuation Scheme. Large international equity book.

allocators.name: NEST
allocators.notes: UK default workplace pension.

allocators.name: CPPIB (Canada)
allocators.notes: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board. Major global allocator; publishes holdings.

allocators.name: CDPQ (Caisse de dépôt)
allocators.notes: Quebec pension manager. Known Spanish infrastructure investments.

allocators.name: CalPERS
allocators.notes: California public employees pension; global equity via index mandates.

allocators.name: Allianz SE
allocators.notes: Largest European insurer by assets. Owns Spanish insurance operations.

allocators.name: AXA

allocators.notes: Spanish insurance operations.

allocators.name: Swiss Re
allocators.notes: Global reinsurer.

allocators.name: Reale Seguros
allocators.notes: Italian-owned, operations in Spain.

allocators.name: Caser
allocators.notes: Helvetia-owned since 2020.

allocators.name: Blackstone
allocators.notes: Major Spanish real-estate player post-2012. Owner of Anticipa Real Estate, Testa Residencial (earlier).

allocators.name: KKR
allocators.notes: Stake in Telxius, Telefónica infrastructure; Naturgy (T-Solar earlier).

allocators.name: Silver Lake
allocators.notes: Tech PE; Spanish positions via Global portfolio.

allocators.name: Oaktree Capital Management
allocators.notes: Distressed + credit. Active in Spanish NPL markets.

allocators.name: Cerberus Capital Management
allocators.notes: Major Spanish NPL buyer (acquired BBVA/Santander NPL portfolios).

allocators.name: CVC Capital Partners
allocators.notes: Spanish roots (founded by Luis Cervera). Stakes in Naturgy, University network, Tendam etc.

allocators.name: EQT
allocators.notes: Active in Spanish tech/infra.

allocators.name: Altamar Capital Partners
allocators.notes: Fund-of-funds + direct (Altamar CAM).

allocators.name: Artá Capital
allocators.notes: March family PE vehicle.

allocators.name: Everwood Capital
allocators.notes: Renewables-focused.

allocators.name: Macquarie Asset Management
allocators.notes: Major Spanish infrastructure investor (Elecnor / Celeo; previously Viesgo).

allocators.name: Global Infrastructure Partners

allocators.name: Brookfield Infrastructure

allocators.name: IFM Investors

allocators.name: Copenhagen Infrastructure Partn.

allocators.name: Blackstone Real Estate

allocators.name: Lone Star Funds
